jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.excerpt: SmartRecruiters is the Recruiting AI Company that transforms hiring for the world’s leading enterprises.
jobs.description:
SmartRecruiters is the Recruiting AI Company that transforms hiring for the world’s leading enterprises. We are looking for a Senior AI Engineer to join our Chat Group, where we’re building the next generation of intelligent conversational systems for the recruiting industry.

Requirements

  • Architect and build agentic workflows that combine large language models, reasoning components, and data pipelines to create adaptive, goal-driven conversational systems
  • Lead the design and development of advanced ML/NLP products, from ideation to production - including model training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment
  • Drive experimentation with new approaches for agentic reasoning, coordination, and autonomous system design
  • Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to integrate intelligent agents into real-world recruiting workflows
  • Guide technical decisions, mentor other engineers, and help define best practices for scalable, maintainable ML systems
  • Contribute to the evolution of our NLP and conversational intelligence stack, focusing on reliability, personalization, and user impact
  • Proactively identify opportunities to automate, improve, and innovate within our chat-based ecosystem

Benefits

  • Competitive salaries
  • Remote-friendly culture
  • Strong internal mobility

Originally posted on Himalayas

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.excerpt: SmartRecruiters is seeking a Senior AI Engineer to design and develop agentic workflows for intelligent conversational systems in the recruiting industry.
jobs.description:
SmartRecruiters is seeking a Senior AI Engineer to design and develop agentic workflows for intelligent conversational systems in the recruiting industry. The role involves architecting and building adaptive, goal-driven conversational systems, leading the design and development of advanced ML/NLP products, and collaborating with product and engineering teams to integrate intelligent agents into real-world recruiting workflows.

Requirements

  • BSc or MSc in Computer Science, Machine Learning, AI, NLP, or a related technical field
  • 5+ years of experience developing and deploying machine learning systems in production
  • Proven expertise in NLP techniques, LLM fine-tuning, and model evaluation
  • Strong proficiency with deep learning frameworks and ML tools
  • Advanced Python programming skills and solid software engineering fundamentals

Benefits

  • Competitive salaries
  • Strong internal mobility
  • Remote-friendly culture
  • Equal Employment Opportunity employer

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.excerpt: Imagine yourself doing cutting-edge AI work that places you at the forefront of the AI space.
jobs.description:
Imagine yourself doing cutting-edge AI work that places you at the forefront of the AI space. Solve complex business problems through advanced Generative AI systems. Grow your expertise while contributing to sustainable innovation. Build intelligent solutions that transform packaging design and workflows.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related quantitative field.
  • Minimum of 6 years of overall software engineering experience, with at least 3 years focused on LLM application development and deployment.
  • Hands-on experience with parameter-efficient fine-tuning techniques such as LoRA and QLoRA.
  • Strong proficiency in PyTorch or JAX.
  • Expert-level experience with LangChain, LlamaIndex, or Haystack, along with scaling vector databases such as Pinecone, Weaviate, or Milvus.
  • Proven experience building custom evaluation datasets and tracking experiments using tools such as Weights & Biases or MLflow.
  • Strong understanding of LLMOps, including CI/CD pipelines, prompt versioning, and model endpoint management.

Benefits

  • Generous Paid Time Off
  • 401k Matching
  • Retirement Plan
  • Visa Sponsorship

jobs.title: Sr. AI Engineer, Labs
jobs.excerpt: About UsHigharc is a VC-backed startup that is changing how new homes are designed and built.
jobs.description:
About Us

Higharc is a VC-backed startup that is changing how new homes are designed and built. Join a founding team who’ve shipped products for Autodesk, Electronic Arts, Nike, and Apple. We have raised a total of $83M with support from top-notch venture capital firms and more than 18 strategic investors—industry leaders in construction, building products manufacturing, and distribution.

We are hiring a Senior AI Engineer as a foundational member of Higharc Labs. This is a role for an entrepreneurial AI engineer who can move from problem definition to shipped software quickly, building agent workflows that are useful, reliable, and safe in production.

What You'll Do

You will work across product, design, ML, and engineering to identify the right bets, build production-safe prototypes, validate with users, and either hand off successful, product-ready betas or sunset with shared learnings. Expect to:

  • Own AI experiments end-to-end: shape hypotheses, define success criteria, build, ship, measure, and iterate

  • Partner with ML Engineering to productize ML prototypes and harden them for production, while leading graduation criteria across technical readiness and product readiness: contracts, failure modes, eval harnesses, user validation, reliability, controlled model updates, and cost controls

  • Design agent action schemas and tool contracts that make model behavior predictable under real-world variance

  • Build retrieval systems (RAG) for agent context: chunking/indexing strategies, vector search quality, and grounding behavior

  • Build orchestration systems for agent workflows: stateful sessions, streaming, async job coordination, and failure recovery

  • Build evaluation loops that combine deterministic validation, domain heuristics, and model-based review

  • Design human-in-the-loop flows for approvals, intervention, and safe execution of high-impact actions

  • Talk directly with users and internal stakeholders to refine problem framing and validate assumptions early

About You

You are excited to have unusual autonomy and greenfield scope in a company with real revenue and customers. You thrive in ambiguity, don't mind that some experiments get killed, and are energized by the challenge of building something new inside an established organization. If that sounds like a feature and not a bug, let's go!

You have:

  • 7+ years experience shipping production software, including customer-facing AI/LLM features

  • Ownership of ambiguous, high-impact problems from concept through deployment and iteration

  • Experience building AI agent systems: tool use, context management, and orchestration loops

  • Experience designing and operating RAG systems, including vector DB-backed retrieval pipelines

  • Experience defining or operating evaluation systems for non-deterministic AI outputs

  • Strong backend systems skills, including stateful services and real-time/streaming workflows

  • Experience managing AI costs in production (model selection, context budgeting, caching, and usage controls)

  • Experience collaborating across research, ML platform, and product teams to move models into production

  • Product engineering instincts: you can simplify scope and prioritize what creates measurable value

  • Clear written and verbal communication in a remote, async environment

A major plus if you also bring:

  • Experience as a technical founder or early engineer at a high-growth SaaS company

  • ML depth: fine-tuning, rigorous model evaluation, and the ability to apply current ML/LLM research in product systems

While we've identified the core experience and skills required above, please still apply if you have more or different experience than this! We will use your previous experience and performance across the series of interviews to establish appropriate level within our organization in a fair and equitable way.

Working at Higharc

Higharc has been remote first since our founding in 2018. We offer flexible hours so you can do your best work without missing out on life. Higharc offers competitive salaries with significant equity, in a fast-growing, well-funded company.

Personal healthiness is an important value for us- we provide comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage, with unlimited PTO, and meaningful maternity/paternity leave to all U.S based employees that are full-time. You'll also have access to other big-company benefits such like short and long-term disability plans and a 401K. Haven't worked remotely before? We provide a stipend to create the ideal home office.

Originally posted on Himalayas

jobs.title: Senior AI Engineer
jobs.excerpt: ChargePoint is looking for a Senior GenAI Engineer to lead the design, development, and operation of production-grade Generative AI systems.
jobs.description:
ChargePoint is looking for a Senior GenAI Engineer to lead the design, development, and operation of production-grade Generative AI systems. The ideal candidate will have experience influencing architecture and technical direction, strong system design and debugging skills for distributed AI systems, and a passion for building scalable, maintainable, and responsible AI platforms.

Requirements

  • 10+ years of professional software engineering experience
  • Strong development skills in Python (required); experience with Java, Go, or TypeScript is a plus
  • Deep hands-on experience with LLMs and Generative AI systems
  • Strong experience with RAG, embeddings, vector search, and prompt engineering
  • Experience building Copilot-style or agent-based AI systems
  • Strong understanding of distributed systems, APIs, and microservices
  • Experience deploying and operating systems using Docker/Kubernetes
  • Experience with Azure, AWS, or GCP
  • Familiarity with LLMOps / MLOps practices

Benefits

  • Generous Paid Time Off
  • 401k Matching
  • Retirement Plan
  • Visa Sponsorship
  • Four Day Work Week
  • Generous Parental Leave
  • Tuition Reimbursement
  • Relocation Assistance

Originally posted on Himalayas

jobs.title: Sr. AI Engineer
jobs.excerpt: We're hiring a Sr.  AI Engineer to help bring AI into the core of how Rula builds better mental healthcare experiences.
jobs.description:
We're hiring a Sr. AI Engineer to help bring AI into the core of how Rula builds better mental healthcare experiences. We aim to create a world where mental health is no longer stigmatized or marginalized, but rather is embraced as an integral part of one's overall well-being.

Requirements

  • 5+ years of AI/ML development
  • 3+ years of deep experience in Python
  • Hands-on experience with foundation models
  • Experience designing evaluation pipelines for human alignment, factual accuracy, or model interpretability.
  • Strong expertise in LLM integration patterns, AI orchestration frameworks, and vector databases
  • Deep understanding of AIOps, data pipelines, evaluation, and observability systems for continuous model improvement.
  • Strong and effective communication skills.
  • Bachelor’s degree or above in Machine Learning, or related field.

Benefits

  • 100% remote work environment
  • Attractive pay and benefits
  • Comprehensive health benefits
  • 401(k) plan access
  • Generous time-off policies
  • Paid parental leave
  • Employee Assistance Program (EAP)
  • New hire home office stipend
  • Quarterly department stipend
  • Wellness events and lunch & learns
  • Community and employee resource groups
